creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-01-29 06:36:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/p5-Net-Nessus-XMLRPC Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is Perl interface for communication with Nessus scanner over XMLRPC.
  You can start, stop, pause and resume scan. Watch progress and status of
  scan, download report, etc.
  
  WWW: http://www.cpan.org/modules/by-authors/id/K/KO/KOST
  
  PR:             ports/154346
  Submitted by:   Paul Schmehl <pauls at utdallas.edu>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2307    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/net/p5-Net-Nessus-XMLRPC/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-Nessus-XMLRPC/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-Nessus-XMLRPC/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-Nessus-XMLRPC/pkg-plist (new)
